title: Granny's minions 2
description: A create experience with all the comforts of a cozy vibe. Go from steam punk to cottage core in one pack. Have fun cooking, riding trains, fighting in dungeons and more.
body:
A create experience with all the comforts of a cozy vibe. Go from steam punk to cottage core in one pack. Have fun cooking, riding trains, fighting in dungeons and more.

build yourself a massive sprawling factory or a farming cottage in the hills then go on an adventure to find ainchent mages or mystical weapons lost in the world

there is tons of new places to find with lots of great loot to help you out so dont forget to bring your backpack and sleeping bag with next time you want to explore in this pack

then settle down with a cozy vibe and all our amazing decorations added or set out to conqour the industrial age with create and its hand picked ad-ons dont forget to explode those inactive vents to get all your raw materials for the factory

if you explore into the magics of the world you will be rewarded with new ways to travel and fight promoting even more exploration untill you are strong enough to take on bosses or dive into the deep dark!!!

aquiculture 2: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture
create:industrialized architecture: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/industrialized-architecture/download/6829755
Cosmetic armor reworked: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked/files/5610814
